titleStmt.title: SII 38.242: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 242. (A.R. No. 242 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the gōpura, left of entrance, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakravartti Śrīraṅganātha Yādavarāya Year 16: Khara Ṛishabha ba. di. 14. Tuesday, ūrōsaṇi (Rōhiṇi).

summary.p: This records a gift of land for conducting a special service called Kāliyūrkiḻavaṉ sandhi instituted by Kāliyūr-kiḻavaṉ Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyān, (a resident) of Seṟṟuppēḍu in Eḻmūrtuḍarmuṉi-nāḍu in Puḻar-kōṭṭam alias Vikramachōḷa-maṇḍalam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that the two vēli of land situated at Kaḍuvaṉ-kōṭṭam alias Aḻiyūviradamkoṇḍa-viḷāgam in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, west of Sēlaivāsal, in Puḻal-kōṭṭam, which was previously granted as tirunāmattukāṇi by the mudalimār of kīḻai-maḍam were excluded and (the balance) two vēli of land were now endowed as tirunāmattūkkāṇi for providing food offerings, during the sandhi called Kāliyūr-kiḻavaṉ sandhi (instituted by the donor in his name).
This donor and another person Niyamaṅkiṉa Dāmōdara perumāṉ figure as signatories to this arrangement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka tiripuvaṉaccakkaravat
tikaḷ śrīciraṅkanātar Iyātavarāyarkku yāṇṭu 10 6
vatu karacaṅvaṟcaruttu Iṣapanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣat
tu catutteciyum cevāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uroca
ṇināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻa
lkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Eḻumū
r tuṭarmuṉināṭṭu ceṟṟuppeṭṭil kaliyūr
kiḻavaṉ tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ Eṉ (eṉ) pe
rāl kaliyūrkiḻavaṉcanti Eṉṟu kaṭṭiṉa
canti Oṉṟukku Amutupaṭikku Aricikuṟu
ṇināṉāḻikkum kaṟiamutu veñcaṉattu
kkumviṭṭa celvat tiruvārūrkīḻaimaṭattu mutali
yār tiruvampalapperumāḷ koṇṭuṭaiya puḻal
nāṭṭu celaivācalil piṟitta tiruvoṟṟiyūrk
ku melkaraiyāka Ivvūrellai Uṭaṉkūṭṭina
kaṭuvaṉkoṭṭamāṉa Aḻiyāvirataṅkoṇṭaviḷākattil tirunāmattuk kāṇiyā
ka muṉṉāḷ kīḻaimaṭattu mutalimār viṭṭa nilam nikki Ivaruṭaiya maṭappuṟam Āy
k kiṭantatu piṉpu nāṉ koṇṭuṭaiya patiṉaṟu cāṇ kollāl nilam Iraṇ
ṭu veliyum tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kaliyūrkiḻavaṉcantikku Amutupaṭikkum kaṟiya
mutu veñcaṉattukkum cantiraātittavaraiyum celvatākac cilālekai paṇṇi kuṭu
tteṉ tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ niyamaṅkiṉa tāmotarapperumāṉeṉ śrī māheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 38.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
